name: Auction Mills Inc.
summary: Auction Mills Inc. offers online auction services to businesses. It engages in the liquidation or purchase of overstock, dead stock, or store returns. The company offers auctions and daily deals. The company's shopping categories include game consoles and accessories; wireless faceplates, car chargers, and hands free; cell phone pouch; iPod; televisions; and cellular phones. Auction Mills Inc. is headquartered in Dallas, Texas.
